title: DesignIntent
description: Phase 3.nl.0 structured-output schema for the natural-language design surface. Mirrors the serde shape of `yee_design::DesignIntent` so a tool-use response can be ingested by Rust without translation. Phase 3.nl.0 ships `family = rectangular_patch` only; other variants land in 3.nl.2 per spec §12.

family.description: Closed-enum geometry family. Phase 3.nl.0 supports rectangular_patch only.

target_frequency_hz.description: Target operating / resonant frequency in hertz.

substrate.description: Substrate stack-up; either a named-library lookup (with optional override) or an explicit {eps_r, h_mm, loss_tangent} record.

name.description: Library key; must match a row in substrates.toml.

override_with.description: Partial override of the named substrate's parameters.

gain_target_dbi.description: Optional gain target in dBi. Recorded only; not used by Phase 3.nl.0's initial estimator.

bandwidth_target_mhz.description: Optional fractional / absolute bandwidth target in megahertz. Recorded only in Phase 3.nl.0.
